name: My Little Friends - Desktop Edition
short_description: Bring adorable virtual pets to your desktop with My Little Friends - Desktop Edition! Watch them roam around, interact with you, and keep you productive with a built-in Pomodoro timer. Customize their looks and animations, control your music, and enjoy a stress-free companion right on your screen.
detailed_description:
My Little Friends - Desktop Edition

Your cutest companions, right on your screen!

Welcome to a cozy world where adorable virtual pets keep you company — whether you're working, studying, or just chilling. These friendly buddies float on your desktop, adding a sprinkle of charm to your day!

🐾 What can your little friends do?

  • Play and Interact: Watch your pets roam around your screen, responding to your clicks and taps!

  • Stay Productive: Use the built-in Pomodoro timer to stay focused — because even cute friends want you to succeed!

  • Media Control: Quickly pause, play, and skip tracks without switching windows.

  • Customizable Fun: You can choose from 34 different animals, with more coming soon!

  • More Apps Coming Soon: Stay tuned for more adorable and useful apps!

🎨 Why you'll love it:

  • Relaxing & Stress-Free: Perfect for those moments when you need a smile.

  • Lightweight & Non-Intrusive: Floats above your work without getting in the way.

  • A Personal Touch: Your pets, your rules — make your desktop as cute or chaotic as you like! 

Get ready to brighten up your screen with My Little Friends - Desktop Edition — because every desktop deserves a little love! 💛
